name: MikroTik solidMOUNT
title: MikroTik solidMOUNT
short_description: An advanced pole mount adapter for LHG series products
description: The MikroTik solidMOUNT is a durable and precise metal mounting adapter designed for secure installation of all LHG series antennas, including the larger LHG XL models. Engineered for professional use, it allows both vertical and horizontal adjustment, enabling accurate antenna alignment for optimal signal performance. The solidMOUNT ensures stable and long-lasting support even in challenging outdoor conditions, making it ideal for reliable point-to-point or wireless network setups. The package includes a U-bolt and a complete mounting kit, providing everything needed for quick and easy installation. With its sturdy construction and flexible adjustment options, the MikroTik solidMOUNT is the perfect choice for installers and network professionals seeking a robust, adjustable, and dependable mounting solution for LHG devices.
